query: Recent French 2027 presidential first-round voting intention polls testing Marine Le Pen by name, June-July 2026, with pollster, fieldwork dates, and Le Pen percentage. Include Ifop, Harris Interactive, Toluna, Elabe, Odoxa, IFOP polls.
answer:
I've compiled a comprehensive report on recent French 2027 presidential first-round polls testing Marine Le Pen by name during June–July 2026.

**Key findings:**

The polling surge followed Le Pen's official candidacy announcement on **7 July 2026** (after a court cleared her to run). Her named first-round score rose from ~31–33% in late May to **34–37% in July**.

**July 2026 (post-announcement):**
- **Ifop** (LCI/Le Figaro, 7–8 Jul, n=984): **36%**
- **Harris Interactive / Toluna** (RTL/M6, 7–8 Jul, n=1,592): **34–36%**
- **OpinionWay** (Les Échos, 8–9 Jul, n=963): **34–36%**
- **Elabe** (BFM/La Tribune Dimanche, 9–10 Jul, n=1,503): **34–35.5%**
- **Verian** (9–10 Jul, n=1,047): **37%** (highest)

**June 2026:**
- **Ifop** (22–24 Jun, n=1,415): **36–37%**
- **OpinionWay** (10–11 Jun, n=1,001): **33–35%**

**Odoxa:** Tested Le Pen at **32%** (low outlier; Odoxa primarily uses Bardella as the RN candidate). No July post-announcement Le Pen-named first-round was found from Odoxa in available sources.

A note on coverage: The requested "Toluna" and "Harris Interactive" are the same pollster (Toluna Harris Interactive). All requested pollsters were found except a specific July Odoxa Le Pen first-round poll, which does not appear to have been published (Odoxa's barometer centers on Bardella). Full structured data with sources has been submitted.

sources.title: Opinion polling for the 2027 French presidential election
sources.snippet: Comprehensive list of 2027 first-round polls including June–July 2026 with pollster, dates, sample, and Le Pen percentages.

sources.title: Les intentions de vote à l'élection présidentielle 2027 après la déclaration de candidature de Marine Le Pen
sources.snippet: Ifop for LCI/Le Figaro: Le Pen 36% first round in both scenarios, up 4 pts in two weeks.

sources.title: SONDAGE RTL - Présidentielle 2027 : Marine Le Pen progresse dans les intentions de vote
sources.snippet: Harris Interactive for RTL/M6, 7–8 Jul 2026, n=1,592: Le Pen 35%/34%/36% across scenarios.

sources.title: Le Pen extends lead in French election poll after court ruling
sources.snippet: Elabe for BFM TV/La Tribune Dimanche, 9–10 Jul 2026, n=1,503: Le Pen 34–35.5%, up 3 pts since March.

sources.title: Présidentielle : Le Pen ou Bardella seraient en tête au premier tour mais battus par Philippe au second
sources.snippet: Odoxa barometer: Le Pen 32% first round in RN-Le Pen hypothesis; Bardella ~31.5% in parallel scenario.

sources.title: Opinion polls see France's Le Pen winning 2027 election despite guilty verdict
sources.snippet: Reuters: both surveys by Ifop for LCI/Le Figaro and Toluna Harris Interactive show Le Pen leading.

sources.title: Sondage exclusif présidentielle 2027 : Marine Le Pen largement en tête
sources.snippet: OpinionWay for Les Échos/Radio Classique, 8–9 Jul 2026: Le Pen leads first round.

sources.title: Présidentielle 2027 - EPOC Info (poll aggregator)
sources.snippet: Rolling average: Le Pen 33.8%, Bardella 35%, Philippe 18.4%.
